hero.titleLine2: Hydration that keeps up with your run.
hero.lead: Sugar-free stick-pack supplement designed to support hydration, electrolyte balance, and recovery — for people who run and train regularly.

marquee: RUNIX SALT+ · ELECTROLYTE REPLENISHMENT · RUNNING · RECOVERY · ZERO SUGAR · STICK PACK ·

product.title: Built for replenishment in real running practice
product.intro: During exercise, sweat carries away key electrolytes. Runix Salt+ helps support hydration, muscle function, and recovery — without overpromising, with language grounded in everyday training.
product.bullet0: Stick-pack format — easy to carry on a run, ride, or in your bag.
product.bullet1: Zero sugar — aligned with a clean sports positioning and people who want hydration without extra sugar calories.
product.bullet2: No artificial colors — focus on acceptability and a premium feel.
product.bullet3: Clear story — supports hydration and electrolytes; not a caffeine energy drink or stimulant pre-workout.

formula.title: A suggested premium base (per stick)
formula.intro: Indicative values for supplier development — aligned with the running + palatability + effective sodium replenishment positioning versus market references cited in brand materials.
formula.note: Calcium may be included as an optional ingredient depending on formulation strategy; in the initial recommended version, the focus stays on sodium, potassium, and magnesium with supporting vitamins.

benefits.title: What each pillar brings to your training
benefits.intro: Responsible wording: ingredients help and contribute in a hydration and performance context — individual responses vary.

ingredients.title: Sodium (Na⁺)
items: Helps regulate hydration and fluid balance
Supports muscle contraction and neuromuscular function
Contributes to avoiding dehydration and sustaining energy on the run

ingredients.title: Potassium (K⁺)
items: Contributes to rhythm and stability during training
Works with sodium in electrolyte balance

ingredients.title: Magnesium (Mg²⁺)
items: May contribute to less fatigue and post-exercise recovery

ingredients.title: Calcium (Ca²⁺)
items: Role in muscle contraction and bone health
May add support in impact training
Not the central focus of the running narrative

ingredients.title: Vitamin C
items: Contributes to post-workout oxidative stress context

ingredients.title: Vitamins B6 & B12
items: Support the nervous system and overall readiness

experience.title: What your routine may feel with appropriate use
experience.intro: When the formula and hydration go hand in hand, many people notice more consistent training — without absolute promises.
duringItems: Less extreme thirst on long sessions
afterItems: Less muscular discomfort in some cases
frequentItems: A feeling that “the session delivered more”
notItems: A substitute for food or medical advice
isItems: Physiological support for hydration and electrolytes
Honest communication: “my run holds up and I don’t fall apart at the end”

science.title: Science in accessible language
science.p1: Runix Salt+ was developed from exercise physiology principles to support fluid–electrolyte balance, muscle function, and recovery in activities like running and endurance.
science.p2: During exercise, electrolyte loss through sweat can affect performance, muscle contraction, and hydration. The ingredient blend works together: sodium helps maintain fluid volume and absorption; potassium and magnesium are involved in muscle excitability and energy metabolism; vitamins C, B6, and B12 provide complementary recovery and metabolism support — without stealing the spotlight from electrolytes.
science.p3: We avoid absolute claims. We prefer words like “contributes,” “helps,” and “supports” — in line with the brand’s communication best practices.

cta.title: Ready to bring Runix Salt+ into your finishing stretch?
cta.body: Reach out to the team to learn about next steps in formulation and availability. The future of your hydration starts with a conversation.

footer.tagline: Runix Salt+ · electrolyte supplement in stick packs.
footer.disclaimer: Notice: This site is informational. Supplements are not a substitute for a balanced diet. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any supplementation. We do not promise a cure or guaranteed results; described benefits refer to nutritional support within a training routine.
